content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.84%, Bank Nifty -1.11%, VIX +1.64% to 18.60 — broad-based weakness with select earnings winners (BHEL, ADANIPORTS, HAL, HFCL) bucking the trend. Book is already ~48% deployed across 9 names with multiple Q4-earnings winners. Priority is managing existing book — trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +5.6%, ADANIPORTS +1.8%, HAL +1.0%) — not adding fresh exposure into a weak tape with elevated VIX.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at SL 1029 (entry 984, +5.6% unrealized, CMP 1040.70). Trail-gap to CMP is ~1.1% — within 1% floor discipline. Holding current SL; no MODIFY needed actually. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1029 already locks in ~+4.6% on entry 984. CMP 1040.70 — gap to SL is only 1.1%, at the floor of acceptable trail-gap. Tightening further would risk same-day stopout on normal chop. Q4 PAT +19% YoY, Bullish thesis intact. Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6% (CMP 121.60 vs entry 125.10), SL 119 (-1.5% below CMP). Gold ETF safe-haven thesis intact (geopolitical, rupee weakness, central bank buying). MACD bearish near-term but secular setup unchanged. Hold to SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL is already 1710 (locks in +0.6%). CMP 1725.80, gap 0.9% — already at the trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1725.80 (+1.8%), stored SL 1710 already at breakeven+. Trail-gap 0.9% is below the 1% floor — tightening further would self-stopout on noise. FY26 record results, +5% on day, top sector performer. Hold to 1820 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 13800, CMP 13449 (-2.5%), SL 13400 (~0.4% below CMP — tight). April record sales +33% YoY supports thesis. SL at 13400 is the natural exit; no looser SL warranted, no tightening room left. Auto sector recovery thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 209, CMP 204.75 (-1.6%), SL 204 (-0.4% below CMP). Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2%, microfinance stress easing. Bank Nifty weak today (-1.11%) pressuring near-term. SL is tight; let it work to either SL or target 220."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4627.50 (+1.0%), SL 4555 already at near-breakeven. +6.65% today on defence theme + new CMD. P&L not yet ≥+2% to mandate breakeven trail; SL 4555 is appropriate at -1.6% from CMP. Hold to 4900 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 380, CMP 379.35 (-0.2%), SL 372 (-1.9% below CMP). Q4 PAT 2x YoY, FY26 PAT 3x, order book Rs 2.4 lakh cr — bullish thesis intact even though stock faded from intraday high 388. SL gives room. Hold to target 410."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1478, CMP 1472.30 (-0.4%), SL 1420 (-3.5% below CMP). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, Rs 6 dividend, net cash. Stock made high of 1577 then faded — Q4 earnings reaction normal. SL gives breathing room. Hold to 1570 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 6847.50 (-0.7%), SL 6650 (-2.9% below CMP). Q4 PAT Rs 664 cr (+2.3x YoY), EBITDA margin 32.6%, Chemours plant commissioning June/July catalyst. 7.7x volume surge today on muted price = institutional accumulation signature. Hold to 7300."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already locks in +4.6%; trail-gap 1.1% near floor, tightening further would invite noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Modest drawdown, safe-haven thesis intact, SL 119 disciplined."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already at breakeven+, trail-gap 0.9%, sector leadership intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 13400 already 0.4% below CMP; thesis on April sales record intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL, Q4 turnaround thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1% gain, defence theme strong; SL 4555 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results bullish, fade from intraday high normal post-earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +124% PAT today, normal post-earnings fade after high 1577."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "7.7x volume = institutional accumulation, Q4 strong, Chemours catalyst pending."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, HAL, ADANIPORTS, SOBHA — already held, riding the earnings-winner theme. HFCL (+13.7%, OFC order, Rs 311 cr FY26 PAT) attractive but extended post-gap; would consider on a pullback to 125-127 zone. TATATECH (+9.5%) and WOCKPHARMA (+10.7%) — strong Q4, but adding now into a weak Nifty tape with VIX at 18.6 stacks correlation with already-held earnings winners. CEMPRO 14.6x volume noted but data not provided. LALPATHLAB faded from gap-up high to red intraday — momentum failed, skip. ADANIGREEN at 52w high with P/E 107x and analyst downgrades — pass. FLUOROCHEM lagging NAVINFLUOR — already have superior chemicals exposure via NAVINFLUOR.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), capital goods/defence (BHEL, HAL), auto (MARUTI), real estate (SOBHA), ports (ADANIPORTS), chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), and gold ETF (GOLDBEES). 48% deployed, 52% cash — comfortable cushion against weak Nifty tape and elevated VIX. Multiple positions are Q4-earnings-driven (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, MARUTI, BANDHANBNK, HAL, BHEL, SOBHA, NAVINFLUOR) — high correlation to earnings-momentum factor. Adding more earnings winners today would compound that correlation; the right move is to let the existing book work and preserve cash for either a market pullback entry or a fresh non-earnings setup. No new entries this tick. Trades today: 9 already executed — no need to churn. Rolling win rate 18% is concerning but profit factor 2.4x indicates wins are paying for losses; discipline on SLs is the lever, not more entries."
}
